changes.description: Progression Planner tab with market data infrastructure
Market data: Engravings (43 items), Honing Materials (36 items), Additional Honing Materials (21 items) with live prices from LOA Buddy API
Gems category (40 items): T3/T4 Damage & Cooldown Lv.1-10 with manual price input
Price history charts: click any item to view 30-day min/max/avg price graph with 7d/14d/30d toggle
Manual price override system with visual badge and fallback to API prices
Roster scraper failing for rosters with characters that have combat power below 1.0 (e.g. Rexlul)
Roster scraper now detects Cloudflare blocks and retries up to 3 times with clear error message
